title: Lady's Vanilla+
description: Just a simple vanilla+ modpack for some friends and anyone else.
body:
Mostly QOL mods, with a few options for texture packs and shaders.

Lightweight pack that fairly sticks to vanilla with a few exceptions such as _Additional Structures, Advanced Netherite, Basic Weapons, Your Items Are Safe, and Xaero's Maps._

QOL mods include _Falling Trees, Mouse Tweaks, Low Shield, Double Doors, Furnace Recycle, Inventory Totem_, and a few more fun mods.


**This pack has very simple mods to just enhance the feel of vanilla Minecraft. You can easily play it with your friends on a server to add more fun, or simply play alone. You can enjoy it either way.**

I made this pack to play with friends on a new server, and for anyone else to enjoy if they'd like. What I like most about this pack is Xaero's world map and mini map, which makes it much easier to get around your world and find what your looking for. Or so you can find your way home without wondering around trying to look at coordinates. The waypoints make my Minecraft life so much better, and they can yours too!


As more mods get updated to the current version they will most likely be added.

Optifine is **not** required to run anything in this pack, just use it if you would like to.
